title: CUSTOM_EQ_001: Custom EQ slider persistence after navigating away and back (Tab switch)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Navigate away: Tap back arrow to Audio Settings
Observe the Custom EQ slider positions
expected: Expected: All sliders show saved values (125Hz=+3, 250Hz=+1, 1kHz=0, 4kHz=-2, 8kHz=-4). Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to default flat (0dB) positions despite 'Custom EQ' preset still being selected.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_002: Custom EQ slider persistence after closing and reopening EQ tab (Screen exit)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Exit EQ screen: Tap back arrow to Audio Settings
expected: Expected: Sliders at 125Hz=+6, 500Hz=+3, 2kHz=-1, 8kHz=-5. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults. This validates the exact bug scenario — slider values lost after save+exit+reopen.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_003: Immediate state trigger — Save and IMMEDIATELY kill app before navigating away
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
IMMEDIATELY force-kill the app (swipe from recents) — do NOT navigate away or switch tabs first
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=+5, 1kHz=-3, 8kHz=+2. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults. This validates that the Save button commits state immediately, not just on screen exit.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_004: Deep lifecycle — Custom EQ persistence after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Wait for app to re-establish connection
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=+4, 500Hz=+2, 2kHz=0, 8kHz=-3. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults after Bluetooth reconnection cycle.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_005: Deep lifecycle — Custom EQ persistence after device power off/on
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=-2, 1kHz=+4, 8kHz=+1. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults after device power cycle.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_006: Device asymmetry — Custom EQ persistence on Poly Sync 20+ (speakerphone)
steps: Prerequisite: Poly Sync 20+ connected via Bluetooth
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=+2, 500Hz=+1, 2kHz=-1, 8kHz=-2. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults. This test targets Sync 20+ specifically to catch device-asymmetric bugs where speakerphone EQ persistence differs from headset EQ persistence.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_007: Device asymmetry — Custom EQ persistence on Poly Surround 85
steps: Prerequisite: Poly Surround 85 connected via Bluetooth
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=+7, 250Hz=+5, 1kHz=0, 4kHz=-3, 8kHz=-6. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults. This test targets Surround 85 specifically to catch device-asymmetric bugs.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_008: Rapid save-and-reopen — immediate re-entry without any intervening action
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Immediately tap back arrow to Audio Settings
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=+3, 2kHz=-2, 8kHz=+4. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults. This is the most basic persistence test — validates that save commits state synchronously before allowing re-entry.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_009: Multiple save cycles — save, exit, reopen, adjust again, save, exit, reopen
steps: Cycle 1: Navigate to Equalizer, select Custom EQ, set 125Hz=+3dB, 1kHz=0dB, 8kHz=-2dB, tap Save, exit, reopen — verify sliders at +3/0/-2
Cycle 2: Without leaving Custom EQ, adjust to 125Hz=+6dB, 1kHz=-1dB, 8kHz=-4dB, tap Save, exit, reopen — verify sliders at +6/-1/-4
Cycle 3: Adjust to 125Hz=0dB, 1kHz=+5dB, 8kHz=+2dB, tap Save, exit, reopen — verify sliders at 0/+5/+2
expected: Expected: Each cycle correctly persists the latest saved slider values. Actual (If Bug): Sliders revert to a previous save or to defaults after any cycle, indicating the save operation is not overwriting the persisted state correctly.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_010: Edge case — Save with all sliders at extreme values (max/min)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Set all sliders to maximum (+10dB or highest allowed value)
Now set all sliders to minimum (-10dB or lowest allowed value)
expected: Expected: All sliders persist at maximum after first save, and at minimum after second save. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults or to a different value, indicating boundary value persistence failure.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_011: App backgrounding (home button) during Custom EQ page with unsaved changes
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Press Home button (app goes to background)
expected: Expected: App returns to Equalizer page with sliders still showing 125Hz=+4, 500Hz=-1, 8kHz=+3 (unsaved changes preserved in UI). Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to last saved values or defaults, indicating the UI state is not preserved across backgrounding.

title: CUSTOM_EQ_012: Phone rotation while on Custom EQ page with saved values
steps: Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: Expected: Sliders persist at 125Hz=+5, 2kHz=-3, 8kHz=+1 after rotation. Actual (If Bug): Sliders reset to 0dB defaults due to Activity recreation losing the slider state.
